description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The front facade includes a paved walkway, two stylized trees, and a driveway with a parked car, suggesting an urban residential setting. The building's exterior is primarily white, with large windows and an open courtyard visible from above, which includes a pool and outdoor seating area. The structure appears to be single-story, with clean lines and a focus on open, communal spaces. The rear and side elevations are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The landscaping is simple, with a few shrubs and trees providing greenery along the street-facing side.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, open courtyard, and minimalist white exterior, set in an urban environment with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, paved walkway, two trees, driveway, and a car, with the open courtyard and pool visible inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the solid white exterior wall, the driveway, and the trees partially obscuring the house.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open courtyard layout, pool, and seating area, with minimal window openings on the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the length of the house, the flat roof, and the street with a car and trees, with less detail of the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved walkway, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and trees.
